curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff of PR #3977. The patch is noisy (11 non-test source files changed) as it refactors uint variable representation across the slashing validation pipeline and type definitions. Primary vulnerability is in the type system where Slot/Epoch use UintNumInf64 (JavaScript number) instead of UintBn64 (BigInt), and in all functions that process AttesterSlashing and ProposerSlashing objects with those number-based types. Vulnerability class confirmed as integer-overflow matching CWE-190.
